event: 7.5 Fr triple lumen right internal jugular vein CVC placement
chest X-ray demonstrating possible arterial cannulation
CVC penetrating right internal jugular vein
separate origins of RSCA and RCCA
systemic heparinization with 5000 units unfractionated heparin
CVC entry site proximity to vertebral artery
11 mm centerline distance from CVC to vertebral artery
stent graft deployment in proximal subclavian artery
proximal stent graft overhang into aortic arch
CVC removal from between stent graft and arterial wall
observation in surgical intensive care unit
transition to apixaban on postoperative day 2
transfer to floor on postoperative day 1
